gold.description: Live signed Alzheimer's Therapeutics frontier — drug targets, mechanisms, BBB delivery, clinical readouts.

submissions.name: Alzheimer's Therapeutics (canonical)
submissions.method: Canonical signed frontier — Phase A content expansion against the Obsidian campaign + BBB-flagship literature (10 papers).

submissions.name: BBB Flagship (v0.29 snapshot)
submissions.method: Frozen v0.29 BBB Flagship — 10 BBB-delivery papers extracted via Literature Scout (claude-cli), human-reviewed and signed. Pre-Phase-A; no broader Aβ/tau/TREM2/ApoE coverage.

submissions.name: Manual curation (12 claims)
submissions.method: Hand-curated Alzheimer's-targets frontier from the curator's zettelkasten — declarative claims about Aβ, BACE1, tau, TREM2, ApoE without primary literature extraction.

submissions.name: BBB Extension (probe)
submissions.method: Single-claim demo frontier; useful only as a substrate sanity check. Expected to score zero on an Alzheimer's leaderboard.
